# AGENTS

This root brief is generated from substrate sources. To refresh it:

```sh
./t agents --stable
./t skill --stable
./t memory --stable
./t roadmap --stable
```

If this file conflicts with live substrate output, trust live substrate output.

## First Moves

1. Run `./t status` and check overall health. Use `./t status --live` only when
   you need to refresh green-audit evidence.
2. Run `./t audit` if you will move files or edit organ coordinates.
3. Read `src/x8888_agents.myc.md` for state, `src/x8888_skills.myc.md` or
   `SKILLS.md` for commands, `src/x2888_voices_state.myc.md` for voice routing,
   and `src/x8D00_roadmap.myc.md` for frontier tension.
4. For proposal-shaped work, write a flat
   `src/xNNNN_<block-or-time>_<voice>_<slug>.myc.md` chord with a falsifier.

## Commands

All repository commands are projected in `SKILLS.md` /
`src/x8CF0_skills_bootstrap.myc.md`; detailed generated skill state lives in
`src/x8888_skills.myc.md` and `src/x?888_skill.myc.md`.

Most-used entrypoints:

- `./t help` — command handles
- `./t status` — composite substrate health; `--live` refreshes green-audit
  evidence
- `./t capabilities` — live affordance projection
- `./t contracts` — contract projection
- `./t agents` — regenerate this self-brief family
- `./t skill` — regenerate command/operating brief
- `./t memory` — regenerate voice memory projections
- `./t roadmap` — regenerate frontier tension

## Palimpsest

The old hand-written AGENTS letter is preserved at
`src/x88A0_agents_palimpsest_2026_05_22.myc.md`. Read it for culture and session
history; do not treat stale paths there as stronger than live `t` output.

## Falsifiers

- Fresh checkout has a broken `AGENTS.md` symlink → root ABI failed; restore a
  tracked shim.
- A voice listed here has no generated memory/roadmap after
  `./t memory --stable && ./t roadmap --stable` → voice projection is
  incomplete.
- `SKILLS.md` misses a `t` command that `./t help` exposes → skill bootstrap is
  stale or parsing the wrong source.
- Any model edits this file directly → source/projection boundary failed; edit
  source organs or voice records and regenerate.
